config.script:
'nx_trace #include "50519"
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' grupa funkcji do wysylania maila (wewnetrznego zastosowania) #comment ' #comment ' nx_send_mail_internal_0_att - wyslij bez zalacznikow, domyslny mail user #comment ' nx_send_mail_internal_1_att - wyslij z 1 zalacznikiem, domyslny mail user #comment ' #comment ' nx_send_mail_internal_ex_0_att - wyslij bez zalacznikow, z podaniem mail user'a #comment ' nx_send_mail_internal_ex_1_att - wyslij z 1 zalacznikiem, z podaniem mail user'a #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
function nx_send_mail_internal_ex_0_att(byval strRecipientAddr,byval strSubject, _ byval strBody,byval strUser,byval strPassword)
NX_TRACE_SUB_START("Wysyłanie wiadomości e-mail " + strSubject + " do " + strRecipientAddr)
dim oNXMailMsg : set oNXMailMsg = nx_.mail.create_msg(strRecipientAddr,strSubject,strBody) dim oNXSendMail: set oNXSendMail = nx_.mail.prepare_send(strUser,strPassword) if oNXSendMail.send(oNXMailMsg) then nx_.trace.info "ISY001", "Wiadomość została wysłana" nx_send_mail_internal_ex_0_att = true else nx_.trace.error "ESY001", "Wiadomość nie została wysłana" nx_send_mail_internal_ex_0_att = false end if
NX_TRACE_END
end function
function nx_send_mail_internal_ex_1_att(byval strRecipientAddr,byval strSubject, _ byval strBody,byval strAttDisplayName,byref varSourceDataRef,byval strUser,byval strPassword)
NX_TRACE_SUB_START("Wysyłanie wiadomości e-mail " + strSubject + " do " + strRecipientAddr)
dim oNXMailMsg : set oNXMailMsg = nx_.mail.create_msg(strRecipientAddr,strSubject,strBody) oNXMailMsg.add_attachment strAttDisplayName,varSourceDataRef
dim oNXSendMail: set oNXSendMail = nx_.mail.prepare_send(strUser,strPassword) if oNXSendMail.send(oNXMailMsg) then nx_.trace.info "ISY002", "Wiadomość została wysłana" nx_send_mail_internal_ex_1_att = true else nx_.trace.error "ESY002", "Wiadomość nie została wysłana" nx_send_mail_internal_ex_1_att = false end if
NX_TRACE_END
end function
#comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
function nx_send_mail_internal_0_att(byval strRecipientAddr,byval strSubject,byval strBody) nx_send_mail_internal_0_att = _ nx_send_mail_internal_ex_0_att(strRecipientAddr,strSubject,strBody,"","") end function
function nx_send_mail_internal_1_att(byval strRecipientAddr,byval strSubject, _ byval strBody,byval strAttDisplayName,byref varSourceDataRef)
nx_send_mail_internal_1_att = nx_send_mail_internal_ex_1_att(strRecipientAddr,strSubject, _ strBody,strAttDisplayName,varSourceDataRef,"","") end function
#comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
